title: Running the Thermo Scientific Arktik Thermal Cycler
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ab1cd","text":"Please contact Dr. Steven Wilhelm (wilhelm@utk.edu) for additional information regarding this protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Press NEW from the main screen This will show a DEFAULT protocol, which is a graphical representation of a typical PCR temperature cycling routine.
Toggle between the different steps with the cursor keys
Press ADD (F1) to add a temperature step to the left of where you want to add it
Press DELETE (F2) to delete a highlighted temperature step

To add advanced options (temperature increment, extend time or slow ramp rate, and temperature gradient) press OPTION (F3) and follow the instructions on the screen. INC (F1) = add or subtract a temperature increment EXT (F2) = add or subtract a time extension RAMP (F3) = slows the ramp rate (input range = 0.1 - 0.4 degrees C/sec. GRAD (F4) = sets a gradient
Press BACK (F4) to exit without saving
Press SAVE (F5) to save the protocol
Highlight a folder and press OPEN (F1)
Highlight the protocol and press OPEN again
Specify the SAMPLE (F4) or BLOCK (F5) mode Sample mode is recommended for most protocols
Specify the vessel type by selecting UTW (F4) or COMMON (F5)
Press YES (F4) to run the protocol
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
